name: Mary Mancini
subject: Special Elections are on the horizon!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

We are profoundly grateful for your support of the Tennessee Democratic Party and our mission to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot.

Right now we have a unique opportunity to do just that, with two special elections for state senate seats coming up this spring.

We’re supporting the Democratic candidates in these races, while simultaneously hitting the ground running with our long-term plan to elect more Democrats overall in 2019 and 2020.

This will be a lot of work, and we’re rolling up our sleeves to get it done. But we need enough resources to ensure we have the people power and the technology needed to carry out this work.

Please give $25, $35, or $100 right now to help us elect Democrats this year and next. https://act.myngp.com/Forms/6954468427655547904?am=&

Thank you so much for your support.

Mary

--

Mary Mancini

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE |
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tennessee Democratic Party
1900 Church Street, Suite 203
Nashville TN 37203 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/2J7E8FOVk7C5Qzxl2PYbQtzxSNvmawxQR3-F8yF78J8=/L0x7pg8g82Cy4DTVa_ZZGrRmEXFWkeLBWgUPkkBnsnY=.

name: Megan West
subject: The lie Christians MUST reject!
body:
| | Peter, We live in a fast-pace, instant gratification culture. So, when it comes to politics and fighting for biblical principles, we can easily become frustrated when we don’t see instantaneous results. This is one of the reasons millions of people – more specifically millions of Christians – opt out of the political process, despite the desperate need for biblical truth in our culture and in the government. **I believe our instant gratification culture has many Christians believing if we don’t see immediate results in the battle for religious liberty, sanctity of life, marriage, and family, then there is no hope and our involvement doesn’t matter.** **That is a LIE.** There are lots of other lies stealing America’s soul. The lie that God is dead. The lie that truth is relative. And the lie that Christians should surrender their values and their voices. But the truth is, our faith has something essential to offer our world. It’s actually what our world needs – they just don’t know it. And it’s why we must stand in unity and for truth. That is why My Faith Votes exists. To equip and mobilize Christians to stand for truth in our communities and in our nation, bringing the influence of our faith into the public square. **It’s a long-term strategy, but** **look at what people like you made possible this year!**
* **Launched a nationwide TV and radio campaign** on TBN, Daystar, Fox News, Salem, K-LOVE, the Bott Radio Network, American Family Radio, and the Christian Satellite Network—reaching more than 150 million households with Biblical worldview and voting resources
* **Introduced the Voting Assistance Center** , the most comprehensive voting toolkit available to churches and Christian voters, along with **My Voter Guide** , the only ballot guide for Christians covering 100% of the 70,000 elections that occurred across the nation.
* **Reached 325,000 students** on 115 Christian College and University campuses equipping them to vote and vote from a biblical worldview
* **Sent 4.9 million emails with faith-based news updates** and **36 million Get-Out-the-Vote reminders** to Christians across the nation****
* **Enabled concerned Christians to send 171,000 messages to elected officials** expressing views on critical issues such as the Kavanaugh confirmation and immigration reform.

Because of people like you, many more Christians are involved, informed, and voting in elections and transforming our communities. The truth is, our work doesn’t stop or slow down just because the midterm elections are over...it is not time to rest and disengage for the next two years. The work we do in 2019 will drive the outcomes in 2020. **There is much to do in 2019 to mobilize millions of Christians in 2020, but we must end 2018 strong. We need your help. Our goal is to raise $380,000 before January 1 st.** **[Can we count on you to stand with us and make a year-end contribution to My Faith Votes](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181228apl01nd&n=1)?** Your gift will be MATCHED dollar for dollar, thanks to a generous matching grant, but it must be in before the end of the year! If we want to see Christians reject the lies that are destroying our country, then we need your help **TODAY**. Christians can speak truth to the lies in our culture IF we reach, equip and mobilize them. A donation of any amount will make a difference. Thank you for giving of your resources _now_ so that future generations can live in a nation that honors God! [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181228apl01nd&n=2) **United. We Stand.**

Megan West
Host of My Faith Votes LIVE
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181228apl01nd&n=3).
[ ](//www.facebook.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.twitter.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.instagram.com/myfaithvotes)

name: Todd Cheewing
subject: Be Heard: Second Amendment Rally
body:
Derek, **New Hampshire Democrats are already making moves to infringe upon the Second Amendment in the new legislative session.** **Wednesday, January 2nd, 2019** is the first opportunity New Hampshire House Democrats have to change the rules of the New Hampshire House to prohibit members of the House (and visitors in the House Gallery) from practicing their constitutional rights. **We must push back!** The House needs to know how Granite Staters will be opposed to this rules change. Please join us for a rally in support of your gun rights on the day after New Year's Day at the State House. [Let us know you're coming by RSVPing here.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyE0a8pfF-2FTvGVznY-2FCKB9Jfzb5eNbkOGrsAW0LBrC62RSYpCGR-2FaT3MbiLGF8WHqX4M06WyqjqiCvVHFGTJgAo4-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MKaCX3xUm6fyRLHsrZvGofLSAF8-2Bw0Ieq7iOiqSg6d3QcU83Gd0tLfum-2Bfuw5g8xAcHSmmrQq192JnXDAHFVxtJJ43FaBl4TwnsaqoKBW1GsDnpD9rXOj625yYp0xy5hhi-2FRB-2BmgMUh-2BbDd-2BJzSDGOW-2Bpme4AIp9CSBr60X8UNu5ySeWetssD6vftuiin2XntgiVDtBkAcKSlVx96MtEkVED8JnNHHSq5fUL8EH8SvsqWA0k2jExtb9zQlwZ24XNSeqsmGFDKcH-2BgNOdaImJdLQ-3D-3D) Todd Cheewing NHGOP Executive Director [ ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyE0a8pfF-2FTvGVznY-2FCKB9Jfzb5eNbkOGrsAW0LBrC62RSYpCGR-2FaT3MbiLGF8WHqX4M06WyqjqiCvVHFGTJgAo4-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MKaCX3xUm6fyRLHsrZvGofLSAF8-2Bw0Ieq7iOiqSg6d3QcU83Gd0tLfum-2Bfuw5g8xAcHSmmrQq192JnXDAHFVxtLAZBCoIwnCf5gr3MRK2FKbot6Y9qvbSAHuaLKMKZi5uC7BpfWYJhn2q7sHzY-2F-2F10uM3yztm51kLuZtZ9a7JED-2BFv68-2FIJT8m3hhX716afDv21Fg9wx9aD9XWNWZH6-2FQCzqtVNYu-2FGzzEjS0PhBC6eyDFZ5UdJ7niQ2k3SaDl2YxQrbwqlkX5V5v2DxnHd5w5Q-3D-3D)

name: Caroline Hall, RoyCooper.com
subject: FWD: I'm asking, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Let's keep this momentum rolling into 2019. Chip in before the *final* deadline.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a7f/2411923266/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181228_eoydeadline2_CH")
---
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw this note from Roy (see below). We're coming up to our biggest -- and final -- fundraising deadline of the year and he needs to know he can count on you. [**Chip in today before the deadline to ensure we hit our goal of raising $25,000 before midnight on December 31.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a7f/2411923266/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181228_eoydeadline2_CH") Let's make sure we head into 2019 with lots of momentum. Thanks for all you continue to do! Caroline \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Roy Cooper**
Date: Thurs, Dec 27, 2018
Subject: I'm asking, Friend Friend,

One of the final acts of this Republican super-majority is to ram through a bill that mandates secrecy for campaign finance investigations by the Elections Board. Today, Republican lawmakers returned to Raleigh for a lame-duck session to override my veto of HB 1029, which could protect politicians who commit fraud. **We broke the super-majorities in November, but this lame-duck group is still at it during their final week of existence. Because of your help, a new day and a new legislature start January 1.** **Now the fight is really getting started and we need your help again. We're only a few days away from our end-of-year fundraising deadline. We need to raise $25,000 before the deadline. Can you help us get there?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a7e/2411923266/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181228_eoydeadline2_CH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
[Chip in $50 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a71/2411923266/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181228_eoydeadline2_CH&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
[Chip in $100 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a70/2411923266/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181228_eoydeadline2_CH&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
[Chip in another amount ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a73/2411923266/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181228_eoydeadline2_CH&utm_source=rcoop")
---

This has been a big year for our state.

We've recruited thousands of good jobs. We fought for meaningful investments in public education -- protecting our students and making our classrooms safer.
We've taken steps to protect our environment and preserve our state's precious natural resources. We've invested in our workforce. **And we broke the Republican super-majorities in both the House and the Senate, ensuring North Carolinians a more balanced government in 2019 and beyond.**

We've made a lot of positive steps for North Carolina this year. But we need to finish strong and carry this momentum into 2019.

[**Can I count on you to chip in before our final deadline of the year?**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a7f/2411923266/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181228_eoydeadline2_CH")

Thanks for all you continue to do for our state,

Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

dpwillis67@gmail.com

[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f0f/2fde7c66/486d7861/15685a72/2411923266/VEsO/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

We're coming up to our biggest -- and final -- fundraising deadline of the year and he needs to know he can count on you. "" Let's make sure we head into 2019 with lots of momentum. Thanks for all you continue to do! Caroline \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Roy Cooper Date: Thurs, Dec 27, 2018 Subject: I'm asking, Friend Friend, One of the final acts of this Republican super-majority is to ram through a bill that mandates secrecy for campaign finance investigations by the Elections Board. Today, Republican lawmakers returned to Raleigh for a lame-duck session to override my veto of HB 1029, which could protect politicians who commit fraud. We broke the super-majorities in November, but this lame-duck group is still at it during their final week of existence. Because of your help, a new day and a new legislature start January 1. Now the fight is really getting started and we need your help again. We're only a few days away from our end-of-year fundraising deadline. We need to raise $25,000 before the deadline.
